title: OutOfMemoryError or GC overhead
recommendation: Monitor heap usage and tune JVM memory settings.

title: Deadlock or thread starvation
recommendation: Analyze thread dumps and avoid blocking shared resources.

title: Connection or thread pool exhaustion
recommendation: Tune pool sizes and monitor thread usage.

title: Classpath or NoClassDefFoundError issues
recommendation: Check build dependencies and classpath configuration.

title: Potential memory leak detected
recommendation: Use profiling tools to identify and fix memory leaks.

title: Null values returned from Map.get() and subsequent isEmpty() call
recommendation: Use null-safe handling: check for null before calling isEmpty; validate required keys earlier
